description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named AMR-Wind Docs that runs on push and pull request events to the development branch, specifically for files in amr-wind, docs, and .github/workflows/docs.yml. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-latest environment, canceling any previous runs, and perform the following steps: set up Python 3.x, install dependencies including doxygen, graphviz, sphinx, and sphinx_rtd_theme, build documentation using sphinx-build and doxygen, and deploy the documentation to a gh-pages branch using JamesIves/github-pages-deploy-action.
